markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 223. Bids & Contracts for Highway Projects
##### § 223.002 — Notice of Bids

The department shall give notice regarding the time and place at which bids on a contract will be opened and the contract awarded. The commission by rule shall determine the most effective method for providing the notice required by this section.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 30, eff. September 1, 2011.*
